query:
-- 查询张雪婷的users和partners数据
SELECT 
  u.id as user_id,
  u.name as user_name,
  u.phone as user_phone,
  u.roles,
  p.id as partner_id,
  p.name as partner_name,
  p.phone as partner_phone,
  p.isActive as partner_active
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN partners p ON u.id = p.userId AND p.isActive = 1
WHERE u.id = 15362146;
